decisions.rationale: The observation already maps to its own base_record_id corridor_webster-ave-bronx, which is the closest matching existing registry record (same corridor_name 'Webster Avenue', same street, same limits 'from The Hub to Williamsbridge', same borough Bronx, and the source 2012_11_sbs_webster_cac4 already appears in that record's source_ids). Per canonicalization rules, when the closest match IS the observation's own base_record_id, the decision is 'new' — the observation enriches an already-captured entity.
